t_ch: 他总会产生疑虑…？！
t_en: He's always having doubts...!?

t_ch: 她知晓只是蜃景…？！
t_en: She knew it was just an illusion...!?

t_ch: 看来，你还未曾发觉那浪花之下的暗涌，灰鱼儿。
t_en: Seems you haven't noticed the undercurrents beneath those waves, Gray Fry.

t_ch: 去看看吧。去看看那悬石滚落、微风倾止的幻宴边境，我那些伙伴们…最真实的样子。
t_en: Go and see. Go see the border of this illusory banquet, where stones hang suspended and gentle winds cease. See my companions... in their truest form.

t_ch: 也许那时你便会愈发明白，欢宴于我，于他们…以及于这个世界的意义。
t_en: Perhaps then you'll better understand what these banquets mean to me, to them... and to this world.

t_ch: …这次的出走，我竟然犹豫了这么久。再会，伙伴们…愿你们能永享这无休的欢宴。
t_en: ...I can't believe I hesitated for so long about leaving. Farewell, my friends... May you forever enjoy this endless banquet.

t_ch: …第一百四十二次。亲爱的阿波罗尼，这是你第一百四十二次面带愁容，离开斯缇科西亚，离开我们的盛宴。
t_en: ...That's the one hundred and forty-second time. Dear Apollonius, this is the one hundred and forty-second time you've carried that worried look, leaving Styxia and our banquet behind.

t_ch: 而在明天，你又会回到我的身边。那时的你会面容慈爱，像一尊和蔼的石像。
t_en: And tomorrow, you'll be by my side again. Your face will be filled with kindness then, like a gentle stone statue.

t_ch: 除了目睹，我也曾哭泣、也曾阻拦，但你最终总会义无反顾地离开。
t_en: I not only witnessed it, I cried and tried to stop you, but you would always leave without hesitation in the end.

t_ch: 无论是怒而离开树庭，还是身先士卒讨伐海洋…你总是将自己视作一枚顽石，试图悬住世界的命运。
t_en: Whether storming out of the Grove in anger, or leading the charge against Ocean... you always see yourself as an immovable boulder, trying to hold the world's destiny in balance.

t_ch: 这就是你，亲爱的阿波罗尼，哪怕我们如今只是幻境中的一簇泡沫……
t_en: That's who you are, dear Apollonius, even though we're now just bubbles in an illusion...

t_ch: 你并未变，我也不会。
t_en: You haven't changed, and neither will I.

t_ch: 我不在乎我们是泡沫还是洋流，是真实还是虚妄……
t_en: I don't care if we're bubbles or ocean currents, reality or illusion...

t_ch: 我只知道，我已经下定了决心，要为你再念那首情诗百次千次，吐露那段应得回响的浪漫……
t_en: All I know is that I've made up my mind to recite that love poem for you a hundred times, a thousand times, to express that romance that deserves its response...

t_ch: 我们会第一次，也会无数次并肩而眠…并再也不用从这场梦中醒来。
t_en: We'll sleep side by side for the first time, and countless times after... and never have to wake up from this dream again.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，可以请你帮个忙吗……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, could you help me with something...

t_ch: 残像…说明阿波罗尼确实来过这里。看看他之后往哪里走吧。
t_en: An afterimage... So Apollonius was definitely here. Let's see where he went next.

t_ch: 能够指引命运的雅努斯迷津，就在这池水之下……
t_en: The destiny-guiding Janus' Maze lies beneath these waters...

t_ch: 真是僻静的居所啊，此地…也不属于欢宴吗？
t_en: What a secluded dwelling... Is this place also not meant for festivities?

t_ch: 有些熟悉的道路，莫非那命运也在主动指引我前去一探究竟么……
t_en: This path feels familiar... Could destiny itself be guiding me to uncover its mysteries?

t_ch: 阿波罗尼，就这么变成了泡沫…该怎么和吟风爵她们说呢……
t_en: Apollonius just dissolved into bubbles... How am I going to tell Dux Carminum and the others...

t_ch: 找到阿波罗尼了？这怎么可能……
t_en: Apollonius is found? That's impossible...

t_ch: 再见，{NICKNAME}…希望我们还有机会再见。
t_en: See you around, {NICKNAME}... until we meet again.

t_ch: 在踏出斯缇科西亚城门的刹那，阿波罗尼便化作泡沫飞散……
t_en: Just as Apollonius passed through Styxia's gates, his entire being dissolved into sea foam and vanished into thin air...

t_ch: 仿佛这欢宴的蜃景，容不下一颗清醒的石子。
t_en: ...like this grand revelry was a dream that couldn't bear the weight of a single sobering thought.

t_ch: 迷津残卷在摇曳着，希望你操控「雅努斯迷津」，帮它追溯过去的推演。
t_en: The Maze scroll fragment is flickering. Use Janus' Maze to help retrace and extrapolate its past.

t_ch: 或许可以抽空帮帮忙？你打算——
t_en: Maybe you could help out when you get a chance? You're planning to—

t_en: Check out the "Daily Requests" page.

t_ch: 欢迎，客人…原来是救世主阁下啊。您方才制作的「专属心酿」已经萃取完成了，请收下。
t_en: Well hello there... Oh! Our great Deliverer! Your "exclusive soul brew" from earlier is ready. Here you are.

t_ch: 那么，我就先行告退……
t_en: Well, I should be going now...

t_ch: …我做的？
t_en: My... brew?

t_ch: 如果是指在葡萄台上走了一遭…这么短时间就能出品吗？
t_en: From stepping on those grapes? How did it become a drink so quickly?

t_ch: 蜜酿是吧，让我尝尝——
t_en: Honey brew, huh? Let me have a sip—

t_ch: 奇妙，这瓶紫色的液体没有任何味道，有种在喝水的错觉。
t_en: Weird. This purple liquid is completely flavorless. Might as well be drinking water.

t_ch: 全是不明白的事，抽空还是去问问情况吧。
t_en: Nothing makes sense here. I'll have to find out what's really going on.

t_ch: 啊，客人，请问您需要什么？
t_en: Greetings! What can I help you with?

t_ch: 我想问问这瓶蜜酿…
t_en: About this honey brew...

t_ch: 刚刚到底是怎么回事？
t_en: What was all that about before?

t_ch: 啊…瞧我这失误，宴会上太久没有生人，我险些忘记您是来自天外了。
t_en: Oh... my apologies! We haven't had outsiders join our celebration in ages. I forgot you're from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 容我介绍，这里是蜜酿采榨区。曾经的斯缇科西亚人——乃至全翁法罗斯所饮的蜜酿，多数都是源自此处的果实，以及满溢之杯的神力。
t_en: Allow me to introduce: the harvest zone for our honey brew. Before everything changed, Styxians and all people of Amphoreus drank brews made from these fruits, blessed by the divine power of the Chalice of Plenty.

t_ch: 而方才您步上的，是法吉娜的祭台。通过亲自挤压葡萄，您的来时路便会立刻化作一瓶「专属心酿」，无论失却欢欣多久，都能以它平复心境，重拾笑靥……
t_en: What you walked across was Phagousa's altar. By personally stepping on the grapes, the journey you took to get here will be instantly turned into a bottle of "exclusive soul brew." One sip is supposed to calm troubled hearts and restore smiles, no matter how long they have been without joy...

t_ch: ——至少，曾经是这样的。
t_en: ...or that's how it used to be, at least.

t_ch: 曾经…？
t_en: "Used to be"?

t_ch: 嗯…不知道您有没有开瓶尝过它的味道，实不相瞒……
t_en: Well... have you tried it yet? To be honest...

t_ch: 就是我手里的这瓶……
t_en: You mean this bottle?

t_ch: 正是，每瓶「专属心酿」的味道各不相同。只是……
t_en: Exactly. Every "exclusive soul brew" should taste different. But unfortunately...

t_ch: 在法吉娜陨命后，祭台的神力已经愈加微弱，现在产出的「专属心酿」可谓寡淡如水，仅能尝出一点点蜜酿香气。
t_en: With Phagousa gone, the altar's power has diminished significantly. Now our "exclusive soul brew" tastes like nothing but water with barely a whisper of honey brew fragrance.

t_ch: 恕我直言，就是白水。
t_en: In other words, it's glorified water.

t_ch: 唉，您说话很直白，我很难过。
t_en: *sigh* Your bluntness hurts.

t_ch: 或许可以找海瑟音？
t_en: Maybe Hysilens could help with this?

t_ch: 的确，不过——客人们意识到味道减退是近期的事，而我们有一阵子没见到海瑟音大人了……
t_en: Good idea, but... the guests only started complaining recently, and Lady Hysilens has been absent for quite a while...

t_ch: 那个，客人…不知您能否……
t_en: So... I was hoping that maybe YOU could...

t_ch: 懂了，我用祷言修一下。
t_en: Let me guess, you want me to fix it with prayers?

t_ch: 您是说欧洛尼斯祷言吗？不不，您也知道那两尊泰坦曾经水火不容，要是动用欧洛尼斯的神力……恐怕会起到反效果。
t_en: Oronyx's Prayer? No, no. Those two Titans couldn't stand each other. Using Oronyx's power... would probably backfire.

t_ch: 我不知道海瑟音在哪。
t_en: I have no idea where to find Hysilens.

t_ch: 我明白，想拜托您的事情是另一件——
t_en: Right, of course. Actually, I had something different in mind...

t_ch: 当下，最妥当的方案，或许是去委任涅赖德斯阁下——她曾是海瑟音大人的贴身辅佐，也是如今唯一的「海洋」司祭。
t_en: Our best option now might be to seek Lady Nereides. She was Lady Hysilens's personal assistant and is currently the only "Ocean" Priest remaining.

t_ch: 或许，她能为我们求来海瑟音大人的权能。
t_en: Perhaps she can channel Lady Hysilens's power to help us.

t_ch: 我们来谈谈委托费……
t_en: Let's discuss my payment...

t_ch: 这是当然，您不会失望。
t_en: Naturally. I'll make it worth your while.

t_ch: 行，我去问问。
t_en: Alright, I'll go speak with her.

t_ch: 感激不尽，阁下。我会准备好谢礼。
t_en: Many thanks! I'll have your payment ready when you return.

t_ch: 为了能让这份独特重现在欢宴之上——万事拜托了，救世主阁下。
t_en: For the sake of bringing this unique experience back to our revelry... we're counting on you, Great Deliverer.

t_ch: 呵呵…哈哈…呵哈哈哈…诶呦，好大一只海蛞蝓……
t_en: Heh... Hah haha.... Hahaha... Whoa, what a huge sea slug...

t_ch: 老人家，您醒醒。
t_en: Ma'am? Ma'am! Time to shake off that buzz.

t_ch: 海蛞蝓叫你上工啦——
t_en: This sea slug needs you to start working again!

t_ch: 哎，还…还怪亲切的——找我有事吗，海里的小精灵？要不要来点蜜酿啊——
t_en: Well, aren't you... *hic* a cute one! Do you need something, little ocean sprite? Care for a sip of my honey brew?

t_ch: 想请您动用「海洋」的权能。
t_en: I need you to channel the power of the "Ocean."

t_ch: 海…洋……？啊…莫非您是海瑟音大人一直在等候的那位——
t_en: The... Ocean? Wait... Are you the one Lady Hysilens has been waiting for?

t_ch: 你简单阐述了来意。
t_en: You quickly explained why you were there.

t_ch: 是吗，岁月已然延伸如此之远…这场永无休止的欢宴间，我几近忘却自己的本职，只是——
t_en: Oh my... Has it been that long already? With all this never-ending revelry, I've almost forgotten what I'm supposed to do... except—

t_ch: 海瑟音大人最后托付给老身的任务——「享受并延续这场欢宴」，唯独这点，我绝不会忘记。带我前去吧，救世主阁下。
t_en: One thing I'll never forget is Lady Hysilens's last task for me: "Enjoy and continue this revelry." Now, Great Deliverer, would you kindly escort me there?

t_ch: 许久不见您清醒的样子了，涅赖德斯大人。
t_en: It's been a while since we've seen you sober, Lady Nereides.

t_ch: 呵，情况我理解了，让我一试吧。
t_en: Well then, I've been briefed. I'll see what I can do.

t_ch: 「变幻波光的化身啊，我向您倾诉，一切驻足聆听您的歌唱，请赐人们的杯中蜜酿满溢——」
t_en: "O embodiment of the shimmering tides, hear my call. The world falls silent for your sacred song. Bless this gathering with cups that never run dry—"

t_ch: 成功了吗？
t_en: Did it work?

t_ch: 怎么没动静？
t_en: Nothing's happening...

t_ch: 这手感…老身也无法断言。救世主阁下，能麻烦您帮忙确认一下吗？
t_en: It feels... hmm, I'm not entirely certain. Great Deliverer, could you give it a taste for me?

t_ch: 晶紫色液体在空中划出流线，随即收入瓶中——一罐蜜酿悄然封装。
t_en: Glimmering streaks of purple liquid swirled through the air and flowed into the vessel in waiting, a flask of honey brew now sealed and ready.

t_ch: 抿一下。
t_en: Take a sip.

t_ch: 一口闷！
t_en: Bottom's up!

t_ch: 和之前一样，白水。
t_en: Same as before. It's just water.

t_ch: 还是没味儿。
t_en: Still tasteless.

t_ch: 看来没成。
t_en: Guess that didn't work out.

t_ch: 果然…法吉娜的权柄已经彻底消散了，事到如今，仅靠海洋的仪式，无法使它恢复分毫。
t_en: I suspected as much. Phagousa's authority entirely faded away. The Ocean's rituals alone cannot restore even the slightest bit of it now.

t_ch: 换个思路吧，接下来，老身会尝试将其「复现」，即重新创造一个祭台。只是，我需要进一步了解它的原理才行。
t_en: Let's try something else. I'll try to "recreate" the flavor by building a new altar. But before that, I need to figure out how it actually works.

t_ch: 找资料？
t_en: Do some research?

t_ch: 在附近找人打听？
t_en: Find someone to ask around?

t_ch: …不，既然救世主阁下在场，不如取一条捷径——直接探求那位已陨泰坦本尊的记忆便是。
t_en: No need for that. With the Great Deliverer here, we have a better option. Let's directly tap into the fallen Titan's memories instead.

t_ch: 麻烦你了，救世主——呵，说来也让人惆怅，阁下应该是最后一位欧洛尼斯神迹的使用者了……
t_en: I'll need your help, Great Deliverer. Hmm... there's a certain sadness in knowing you're likely the last to ever wield Oronyx's Miracle.

t_ch: 总之试试看吧。
t_en: Worth a shot.

t_ch: ——激起往昔的涟漪！
t_en: ...Stir up ripples of past reverie!

t_ch: 或许是你曾回溯过它一次的关系，记忆之声如约而至。
t_en: Their memory speaks to you like greeting an old friend, probably because you've rewound them once already.

t_ch: 嗯…欢宴已抵热潮，可是…不喜蜜酿之人…仍比比皆是啊。
t_en: Well... Our revelry is at its height, but... Too many have passed on the honey brew.

t_ch: 怎么办呢？又不能给人强灌下去——也许能？啊，啊，有了，有了。
t_en: What should I do? Can't exactly force them to drink it— Or can I? No, wait, I've got a better idea!

t_ch: 摘取他们满溢的喜好来酿造，将回忆化作果浆，绝妙！
t_en: I'll harvest their deepest desires for my brew, spinning memories into liquid joy. Behold my genius!

t_ch: 来吧，宝贝儿们…踩吧，把你们的渴望踏入池中——
t_en: That's it, my lovelies... step in and crush your desires deep into the basin—

t_ch: 毕竟…没人会拒绝自己最爱的味道……
t_en: After all... no one ever turns down a sip of their own deepest longing...

t_ch: 不愧是蜜酿的泰坦…
t_en: Yep, that's the Titan of Honey Brew alright...

t_ch: 它还挺擅长推销的。
t_en: They've got quite the silver tongue.

t_ch: 「择取人们的喜好，创造不同口味的蜜酿」，正可谓法吉娜的印象所示。
t_en: "Honey brews for every palate, each bottle filled with different desires." That's the divine work Phagousa is most known for.

t_ch: 然而很遗憾，在海瑟音大人的权柄中，并不包含窥探内心一事。
t_en: Sadly, peering into hearts and minds isn't part of Lady Hysilens's authority.

t_ch: 陷入僵局了。
t_en: So we're at a dead end.

t_ch: 还有其他手段吗？
t_en: Got any other ideas?

t_ch: 新人半神，也没办法。
t_en: Can't blame her. She's still new to being a demigod.

t_ch: 「纵使回声褪成遗忘，那些身影也从未模糊」——百十年前，一度苏醒的海瑟音大人曾对我这样说过。
t_en: "Echoes of memories may fade to oblivion, but the people in them never lose their shape." Lady Hysilens spoke these words to me during a rare lucid moment a century past.

t_ch: …足矣。万分感激，救世主阁下。老身方才明白了，该如何「将味道复现」。
t_en: I see it clearly now. My deepest thanks, Great Deliverer. Now I know how to "recreate the flavor."

t_ch: 先回到酿造区吧，这一次，也要麻烦阁下了。
t_en: Let's head back to the harvest zone. I'll need your help one more time.

t_ch: 涅赖德斯大人，看您的表情，想必是已经有眉目了？
t_en: Lady Nereides, you look like you've figured something out?

t_ch: 算是吧，让开些，小心被卷入洋流中去。
t_en: You could say that. Step back. You don't want to get pulled into the ocean currents.

t_ch: 「变幻波光的化身啊——我向您倾诉，请择清忆为实，赐人们的杯中蜜酿满溢——」
t_en: "O embodiment of the shimmering tides, hear my call. Turn their memories into honey brew and bless this gathering with cups that never run dry—"

t_ch: 黯淡，却又星星点点。
t_en: The brew glimmers faintly, sprinkled with twinkling specks.

t_ch: 阁下，拜托了。
t_en: Great Deliverer, if you would.

t_ch: 晶紫色液体在空中划出流线，随即收入瓶中——一罐蜜酿悄然封装。
t_en: Glimmering streaks of purple liquid swirled through the air and flowed into the vessel in waiting, a flask of honey brew now sealed and ready.

t_ch: 抿一下。
t_en: Take a sip.

t_ch: 柔和的口感，花香，水生调…这真的是蜜酿？不对，你确信这个味道似乎在哪里……
t_en: Silky consistency, floral fragrance, water elements... Is this actually honey brew? No, wait... this taste seems familiar, like you've had it somewhere...

t_ch: 一口闷！
t_en: Bottom's up!

t_ch: 呛人的风味并未如预期般向你袭来，取而代之的却是一种熟悉感，就像在哪里……
t_en: Instead of the strong kick you expected, you're struck by a familiar taste, like you've had it somewhere...

t_ch: 这是海瑟音给我尝过的…
t_en: This is the taste of...

t_ch: 啊啊，感谢您，海瑟音大人…我们成功了，救世主阁下。
t_en: Oh, blessed be Lady Hysilens! We've done it, Great Deliverer.

t_ch: 我不理解……
t_en: I don't understand...

t_ch: 也就是说……
t_en: Are you saying...

t_ch: 这是海瑟音大人的认知中，您来到翁法罗斯后，最为熟悉的饮品。
t_en: Lady Hysilens somehow knows that this is the drink you've become most familiar with since arriving in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 她没有到访的我们的欢宴，但却对这座城邦中的每个人都无比熟知……
t_en: Despite never gracing our revelry, she possesses an intimate knowledge of every person in this city-state...

t_ch: 如此一来，在这片幻境中，回味便与心酿无异。
t_en: So in this illusion, everyone tastes the drink exactly what their souls have brewed.

t_ch: …那瓶「神血蜜露」的味道？
t_en: ...the Dew of Divine Blood that Hysilens let me try?

t_ch: 不久后……
t_en: Moments later...

t_ch: 没错，没错，就是这个——哎呀，暌违十五年的「专属心酿」，总算回来了。
t_en: Oh yes! This is definitely it! The "exclusive soul brew" I've been craving for fifteen years is finally back!

t_ch: 我这瓶倒是跟之前不太一样……但没关系，这瓶也…好喝！
t_en: The flavor isn't quite what I remember... but honestly? That doesn't matter. This new bottle is incredible!

t_ch: 好了各位，多亏司祭求来海瑟音大人的赐福，我们重新开业啦。
t_en: Ladies and gentlemen! Our doors are officially reopened, all thanks to our priest who prayed for Lady Hysilens's blessing!

t_ch: 好啊！千年未见的味道，这下又能喝着啦——
t_en: Fantastic! A taste lost for a thousand years, now ours to enjoy again—

t_ch: 救世主阁下，涅赖德斯大人，这次真是麻烦二位了。
t_en: Great Deliverer, Lady Nereides, your help has been absolutely invaluable to us.

t_ch: 小事儿。
t_en: Happy to help.

t_ch: 说好的跑腿费…
t_en: About that payment you promised...

t_ch: 哈哈，当然！稍后就拿给您，您可以期待一下！
t_en: Certainly! I'll fetch it right away. I promise you'll be pleased!

t_ch: 实在是感激不尽，后续您要是有朋友来到这里，欢迎来酿造区体验！这场欢宴欢迎每一个热爱蜜酿的人！
t_en: We cannot thank you enough. If you ever return with friends, do stop by our harvest zone! Our revelry has room for anyone who enjoys honey brew!

t_ch: 之后要忙起来了，请原谅我先行告退，二位还请慢慢参观。
t_en: I've got to run now, business calls. Please, make yourselves at home and feel free to look around.

t_ch: 救世主阁下，我有一件物品要交付于你。
t_en: Great Deliverer, I have a special item that belongs in your hands.

t_ch: 这是？
t_en: What's this?

t_ch: 看着就很贵。
t_en: Whatever it is, it looks expensive.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯唯一的一樽，源自「海洋」的纯酿，樽铭为「把欢宴带去明天」。无他，无价。
t_en: The last bottle in all of Amphoreus, a pure brew of the "Ocean," bearing the inscription "Take the Feast to Tomorrow." It is, quite simply, priceless.

t_ch: 它是在那千年的歌谣被唱诵前，由海瑟音大人亲手创制封装的。
t_en: Lady Hysilens personally created and sealed it, long before anyone had ever heard that ancient ballad.

t_ch: 海瑟音大人唯一的嘱咐，便是将它交给她所等待的那一位——
t_en: She left just one request, that this bottle find its way to the person she's been waiting for—

t_ch: 我切实收下了。
t_en: I'm honored to receive this.

t_ch: 意义非凡啊。
t_en: This is incredibly significant.

t_ch: …她呼唤我们到她身边，却从未消解那份孤独。好在，阁下现在身在此处。
t_en: She gathered us around her, yet never escaped her solitude. Now that you're here, perhaps that will change.

t_ch: 阁下……你认为，现在的「心酿」，仍与往日一致吗？
t_en: Tell me, Great Deliverer... is the "soul brew" we make today still faithful to what it once was?

t_ch: 大家都很开心，这就够了。
t_en: As long as everyone's happy, that's all that matters.

t_ch: 我觉得还是有区别的…
t_en: I think there's a difference...

t_ch: 阁下是这么想的吗…不过，无论何种论点，都算不上错谬。
t_en: So that's what you think... Still, no opinion is truly wrong here.

t_ch: 毕竟，延续欢宴的并非蜜酿本身，而是蜜酿中流淌的故事。
t_en: After all, what carries the revelry forward isn't the honey brew itself, but the stories it holds.

t_ch: 下回，一起畅饮一杯吧，救世主阁下。
t_en: Next time, let's share a cup together, Great Deliverer.

t_ch: 烈到难以入口的纯酿，很难想象什么样的人才会喜欢这种口味，或是把这瓶送给别人。
t_en: A pure brew so harsh it burns going down. Hard to imagine who would enjoy something like that, or even gift it to someone else.

t_ch: 虽然像是鲜血，但其实是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>纯石榴汁。悬锋人，实在奇妙。
t_en: It may look like blood, but it's actually <unbreak>100%</unbreak> pure pomegranate juice. The Kremnoans are truly something else.

t_ch: 瓶身色彩斑斓，味道千变万化——啊，上等的果昔。
t_en: A riot of color on the bottle, and an ever-shifting taste inside— Ah, now that's a fine fruit smoothie.

t_ch: 不含浓度的葡萄汁。似乎是因为一些用于发酵的生命已远渡冥界了……
t_en: Unfermented grape juice. Seems the life meant to spark the fermentation has long since crossed into the nether realm...

t_ch: 只有极少数人能品出，这樽蜜酿有多么价值不菲。铭为「致大地兽」，光历<unbreak>4500</unbreak>年制。
t_en: Only a rare few can tell just how valuable this honey brew is. Labeled "To Dromas," crafted in Light Calendar <unbreak>4500</unbreak>.

t_ch: 天空一族没太有饮用蜜酿的习惯，毕竟葡萄在高海拔地区无法生长——所以，这是一瓶水汽蒸发「云酿」…就是蒸馏水。
t_en: The Sky people never developed a taste for honey brew, as grapes simply won't grow at these altitudes. So what we have here is "Cloudbrew," made from condensed vapor... basically just distilled water.

t_ch: 粗制蜜酿，就像是各个城邦市场售卖的，需要自己带个小碗去盛的那种便宜货一样——还怪好喝的。
t_en: Crude honey brew, the kind sold in every city-state marketplace. Cheap enough you have to bring your own bowl to scoop it. Honestly? Kinda tasty.

t_ch: 你得到了一瓶十分浑浊的蜜酿，味道粗糙苦涩，只应属于街头流民的行囊…凯撒居然喝过这种东西？
t_en: You obtain a bottle of murky honey brew, rough and bitter. The sort that belongs in the pack of a vagabond... Wait, the Imperator drank this before?

t_ch: 一瓶口感绝佳的蜜酿，堪比神血的精品…但似乎掺杂着硝烟、鲜血与泪水的味道。
t_en: A bottle of exquisite honey brew, superb as divine blood... yet its flavor carries the smoke of war, the sting of blood, and the salt of tears.

t_ch: 葡萄啪嗒啪嗒作响，一瓶瓶蜜酿被灌装——很可惜，属于你的那瓶还没准备好。
t_en: The grapes plip and plop as they're pressed, and bottle after bottle is filled. Shame the one meant for you isn't ready just yet.

t_ch: 熟悉的味道，虽并非真品，但却能从中感受到——那位「海洋」半神努力尝试复现时的真切心意。
t_en: The taste is familiar. Even though it's not the real thing, I can feel the sincerity of the demigod of Ocean in trying to recreate it.

t_ch: 盛放葡萄的池子…看起来很好踩啊，要不要走上去试试？
t_en: That pool full of grapes... looks way too tempting to stomp on. Wanna take a step and try it?

t_ch: 为了能让这份独特重现在欢宴之上——万事拜托了，救世主阁下。
t_en: For the sake of bringing this unique experience back to our revelry... we're counting on you, Great Deliverer.

t_ch: 救世主阁下，能麻烦您帮忙确认一下吗？只要走上祭台，再制造一瓶心酿便好。
t_en: Great Deliverer, might I trouble you to verify? Simply step onto the altar and craft another bottle of soul brew.

t_ch: 喔，不知修好了没有？救世主阁下，您再做一瓶看看？
t_en: Oh? I wonder if it's working now. Great Deliverer, could you try making one more bottle?

t_ch: 拜托了，阁下。走上祭台，再制造一瓶心酿吧。
t_en: Please, Great Deliverer. Step onto the altar and craft another bottle of soul brew.

t_ch: 我感受到了，祭台似乎重新焕发出了活力……
t_en: I can feel it. The altar seems to have come back to life...

t_ch: 「心酿」回归了。把握好「仅一次」的机会，让一位翁法罗斯遇到的朋友来尝试，或许……
t_en: The soul brew has returned. Make the most of this "one and only chance." Let a friend from Amphoreus try it, and maybe...

t_ch: 如果在列车的这个位置布设空间望远镜，应该能观测到更短的波长……
t_en: If a space telescope were deployed at this location on the Express, it would almost certainly be possible to observe shorter wavelengths...

t_ch: 嗯，方向感觉还不错。
t_en: Mm, feels like a good angle.

t_ch: 有新论文选题？
t_en: Have you got a new thesis topic?

t_ch: 是呀。之前苦思冥想不得其法，一登上列车，想法就接二连三地冒出来，灵感真是折磨人的小妖怪。
t_en: Sure do! Y'know, I was racking my brains before I boarded the Express, but now I've got more ideas than I know what to do with. Inspiration is a fickle mistress.

t_ch: 这篇论文或许和列车有关…到时候还要请你们接受我的采访，多多提供一手资料。
t_en: My thesis might just be related to the Express... I hope you'll agree to be interviewed later — I need first-hand information.

t_ch: 刚刚在工作吗？
t_en: Here for work?

t_ch: 当然不是啦。我又不是以工作名义来参观的，而是受到了{NICKNAME}的邀请，对吧？
t_en: Of course not — I'm here on your invitation. Isn't that right?

t_ch: 所以在登上列车的那一刻，我就迫不及待调整至休假模式，全力睁大眼睛，寻找下一个论文选题。
t_en: That's why I went into vacation mode the second I boarded the Express — thesis topics don't unearth themselves y'know.

t_ch: ——这些都不是重点啦。
t_en: ...Of course, there are other things in life too.

t_ch: 今天就好好享受列车时光吧。
t_en: Why not just soak in the Express for today.

t_ch: 说得没错。
t_en: That's not a bad idea.

t_ch: 虽然之前也来过列车，不过有{NICKNAME}在的列车，我还是第一次来呢。
t_en: I've been on the Express before, but this is my first visit with {NICKNAME} on board.

t_ch: 我很期待哦。
t_en: Looking forward to it!

t_ch: 应该能观测到吧……
t_en: I should be able to observe...

t_ch: 如果能观测到更短的波长，那可以当作论文的新选题…不过不是今天的重点啦。
t_en: If shorter wavelengths could be observed, it'd make for a good thesis... But that's not the focus of today.

t_ch: 今天就好好享受列车时光吧。
t_en: Why not just soak in the Express for now.

t_ch: 说得没错。
t_en: That's not a bad idea.

t_ch: 虽然之前也来过列车，不过有{NICKNAME}在的列车，我还是第一次来呢。
t_en: I've been on the Express before, but this is my first visit with {NICKNAME} on board.

t_ch: 我很期待哦。
t_en: Looking forward to it!

t_ch: 列车上有不少我只在目录上见过的奇物，虽然仅靠肉眼我也不能完全确信……
t_en: There are quite a few curios on the Express that I've only seen in the catalogs, though I'll need to see them up close before I believe them...

t_ch: 万能合成机？
t_en: Omni-Synthesizer?

t_ch: 我猜它应该是合成机的原型机之一，底座上或许还留有空间站的奇物编码。
t_en: I'm guessing that's one of the prototype synthesizers. There may be a curio code on its base.

t_ch: 但公司并未从一开始就推出「万能」系列，你猜为什么？
t_en: "Omni" makes it sound pretty capable, but the Corporation released other models onto the market first. Know why?

t_ch: 答案是他们还想赚普通合成机的钱~
t_en: Well, why make "omni" money when you can make ordinary money first~?

t_ch: 留声机？
t_en: Phonograph?

t_ch: 唔，我倒不认为它是个奇物。
t_en: Oh, I don't think that's a curio.

t_ch: 它的曲库齐全得惊人，除了大量资金投入，我想象不到你们有其他办法来解决版权问题。
t_en: It's amazing how many songs are stored in its library. Someone must have paid big money to get all the copyright issues sorted.

t_ch: 不过，最可疑的当属那边的沙发……
t_en: Hmm... there's something weird about that sofa over there...

t_ch: 为什么{NICKNAME}你可以选择坐下，但我做不到。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how come it lets you sit on it, but not me?

t_ch: 或许它有自己的一套选择机制，只有被这个奇物认可的人才被允许坐在上面。
t_en: Perhaps it has its own set of authorization mechanisms, and only those it recognizes are permitted to sit on it.

t_ch: 唔…我还得研究研究……
t_en: Interesting... I'll have to have a closer look some time.

t_ch: 列车上有不少奇物……
t_en: There are a lot of Curios on the Express...

t_ch: 唔…那个沙发真的很可疑……
t_en: Huh... there's something strange about that sofa.

t_ch: 为什么{NICKNAME}你可以选择坐下，但我做不到。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how come it lets you sit on it, but not me?

t_ch: 或许它有自己的一套选择机制，只有被这个奇物认可的人才被允许坐在上面。
t_en: Perhaps it has its own set of authorization mechanisms, and only those it recognizes are permitted to sit on it.

t_ch: 唔…我还得研究研究……
t_en: Interesting... I'll have to have a closer look some time.

t_ch: 居然有这么古老的玩意儿…你们还在用这种老式留声机吗？
t_en: This must be ancient... Is the Express crew still using it?

t_ch: 好歹还能用。
t_en: It's aged well.

t_ch: 那倒也是。
t_en: Indeed it has.

t_ch: 有什么问题吗？
t_en: Yeah, why?

t_ch: 那倒没有，只是比较少见。
t_en: Oh, nothing. It's just you don't see things like this every day.

t_ch: 留声机…要听歌得用黑胶碟片吧？在空间站里，只有极少数的音乐爱好者才有收集实体唱片的习惯。
t_en: Phonographs...They use vinyl records, right? There's only a handful of folks on the space station who collect those things.

t_ch: 要不然就是像古恩那种老头子才会用…不过我记得他听的是录音带。
t_en: I think they're more popular with the older crowd — I bet Gunn would know how to use them. Still, if I remember correctly, Gunn only listens to audio tapes...

t_ch: 那你平时怎么听歌？
t_en: How do you listen to music?

t_ch: 和你们一样啊，用终端随便听听。
t_en: Same as you guys — on terminals.

t_ch: 你好像很了解这些。
t_en: You seem to know a lot.

t_ch: 你是说音乐吗？我只是偶尔听听，称不上什么行家。
t_en: About music? I'd say I'm more of a casual listener than a hardcore enthusiast.

t_ch: 唔，我算是明白为什么总有人喜欢这种古老笨重又不方便的「大块头」了。
t_en: Huh... What with them being so big and heavy, I used to wonder why anyone would ever buy a Phonograph. Think I'm starting to get it now.

t_ch: 因为「公司」旗下的音乐平台实在太乱了，像我就是十几个平台的付费会员。
t_en: It's hard to find the music you want on the streaming platforms managed by the IPC. I, for one, had to subscribe to at least a dozen of them.

t_ch: 收费倒不贵，只是切换起来太麻烦了，还不如留声机呢——只要有碟片，想听什么就放什么，还能满足收藏欲。
t_en: It's not like they're expensive or anything. It's just a hassle to switch between them to find the song you like. With a Phonograph, it's essentially just plug-and-play. It also scratches the itch to collect things I guess.

t_ch: 居然有古老的玩意儿……
t_en: That thing is ancient...

t_ch: 居然有这么古老的玩意儿…没想到你们还在用它听歌。
t_en: That thing is ancient... It's amazing you guys are still using it.

t_ch: 唔，我算是明白为什么总有人喜欢这种古老笨重又不方便的「大块头」了。
t_en: Huh... What with them being so big and heavy, I used to wonder why anyone would ever buy a Phonograph. Think I'm starting to get it now.

t_ch: 因为「公司」旗下的音乐平台实在太乱了，像我就是十几个平台的付费会员。
t_en: It's hard to find the music you want on the streaming platforms managed by the IPC. I, for one, had to subscribe to at least a dozen of them.

t_ch: 收费倒不贵，只是切换起来太麻烦了，还不如留声机呢——只要有碟片，想听什么就放什么，还能满足收藏欲。
t_en: It's not like they're expensive or anything. It's just a hassle to switch between them to find the song you like. With a Phonograph, it's essentially just plug-and-play. It also scratches the itch to collect things I guess.

t_ch: 咦，{NICKNAME}也在啊？
t_en: Oh, fancy seeing you here, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 我最近难得有空，还想上列车找姬子姐姐聊聊，没想到正好碰见你……
t_en: I finally managed to get some time off work and thought I'd hop on the Express for a chat with Himeko. I had no idea I'd bump into you...

t_ch: 那我走？
t_en: Should I... leave you to it?

t_ch: 我不是这个意思！我以为你在外面冒险呢，所以有点惊讶。
t_en: That's not what I'm saying! I just thought you'd be on an adventure somewhere, that's all.

t_ch: 跟我们一起旅行呗！
t_en: Travel with us!

t_ch: 那可不行，空间站里还有很多事要忙呢。
t_en: Sadly, I can't. Too much work on the space station.

t_ch: 以前列车停靠在空间站月台的时候，我来拜访过不少次。
t_en: Y'know, whenever the Express stops at the station platform, I make a point of getting a few visits in.

t_ch: 但我感觉，现在的列车好像和以前不大一样了……
t_en: I will say, the train feels a little different now...

t_ch: 我觉得，自从你加入列车组之后，星穹列车里好像更「生机勃勃」了。
t_en: It's almost as if you joining the crew has given everyone an extra boost of energy...

t_ch: 这个说法可能过于抽象，但这就是我刚刚见到你时的直观印象。休息时间能和好朋友偶遇，怎么说都是件开心的事。
t_en: ...And this might sound a little strange, but that's how I felt when I first met you, hehe. Anyway, whichever way you slice it, it's always nice to bump into a friend.

t_ch: 咦，你也在啊？
t_en: Oh, fancy seeing you here!

t_ch: 没想到正好碰见你…
t_en: I didn't expect to bump into you...

t_ch: 以前列车停靠在空间站月台的时候，我来拜访过不少次。
t_en: Y'know, whenever the Express stops at the station platform, I make a point of getting a few visits in.

t_ch: 但我感觉，现在的列车好像和以前不大一样了……
t_en: I will say, the train feels a little different now...

t_ch: 我觉得，自从你加入列车组之后，星穹列车上的气氛好像更「生机勃勃」了。
t_en: It's almost as if you joining the crew has given everyone an extra boost of energy...

t_ch: 这个说法可能过于抽象，但这就是我刚刚见到你时的直观印象。休息时间能和好朋友偶遇，怎么说都是件开心的事。
t_en: ...And this might sound a little strange, but that's how I felt when I first met you, hehe. Anyway, whichever way you slice it, it's always nice to bump into a friend.

t_ch: 要是有机会，真想把我的望远镜搬到列车上。
t_en: If I get the chance, I'd love to bring my telescope onto the Express.

t_ch: 车厢里放得下吗？
t_en: Are you sure it'd fit?

t_ch: 不是那种笨重的巨型天文望远镜啦，是那种能随时随地组装起来的。
t_en: Not an observatory-sized one, haha. I've got a portable one — it can be disassembled and reassembled super easily.

t_ch: 底座虽然又小又轻便，但用着还蛮稳固，我小时候经常用它来看星星。
t_en: It's got a small base, but it's stable enough to get the job done. I used to love stargazing with it when I was a child.

t_ch: 用来看星星吗？
t_en: To stargaze?

t_ch: 是，但又不是。
t_en: Yes, and no.

t_ch: 虽说宇宙中遍布着各式各样的星体，但我们究竟能观测到什么，这谁也说不准。
t_en: There are all kinds of wonders in the universe — you never know what you might find with a telescope.

t_ch: 列车上的光源设置得很合理，车窗这边的视野也棒。
t_en: The lighting on the Express is perfect for observations. Great views at the windows too.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你要是有空，可以坐在这儿，关上灯，仔细看看窗外的景色。
t_en: When you find a moment, sit here and turn off the lights. You'll be amazed by what you can see.

t_ch: 如果累了，直接躺在座位上看也行——不论从什么角度看，宇宙总是那么迷人。
t_en: And if you're feeling a little tired, lie down on the seats instead. The universe is fascinating from every angle.

t_ch: 车窗边简直是最佳观星点，唔，老实说我都有点羡慕了。
t_en: There's no better place for looking out into the stars than the Express. I envy you guys.

t_ch: 真想把望远镜搬过来……
t_en: I really want to move the telescope here...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你要是有空，可以坐在车窗这儿，关上灯，仔细看看窗外的景色。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, if you get any time, you can sit here in the window seat, turn off the lights, and have a nice long gaze out the window.

t_ch: 如果累了，直接躺在座位上看也行——不论从什么角度看，宇宙总是那么迷人。
t_en: And if you're feeling a little tired, lie down on the seats instead. The universe is fascinating from every angle.

t_ch: 车窗边简直是最佳观星点，唔，老实说我都有点羡慕了。
t_en: There's no better place for looking out into the stars than the Express. I envy you guys.

t_ch: 太好了，{NICKNAME}，我正好有事找你呢。
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}! I was looking for you.

t_ch: 不用紧张，并不是什么大事。
t_en: Don't look so worried! I'm not throwing you another mission.

t_ch: 之前你在空间站的时候，帮了大家不少忙。多亏了你，我的工作也轻松了不少。
t_en: You were a great help to folks on the space station — my job was so much easier with you around.

t_ch: 趁有空，我就来列车上转转，顺便给你带了点小礼物，不是什么贵重物品，只是一点心意啦！
t_en: I was due a visit, so I thought I'd bring you a gift. Nothing too precious, just my way of saying thank you!

t_ch: 你要是有空，记得回空间站看看，大家都挺想你的。
t_en: If you're ever free to visit the space station, please come check in on us. We all miss you.

t_ch: 给你带了点小礼物。
t_en: Here's a little gift for you.

t_ch: 之前你在空间站的时候，帮了大家不少忙。多亏了你，我的工作也轻松了不少。
t_en: You were a great help to folks on the space station — my job was so much easier with you around.

t_ch: 处理完之前的事情，这几天甚至都有空闲来车上转转了。
t_en: Now that things have settled down, I finally have time to pay the Express a visit.

t_ch: 你要是有空，记得回空间站看看，大家都挺想你的。
t_en: If you're ever free to visit the space station, please come check in on us. We all miss you.

t_ch: 不久之前，我还在思考何时才能再次见到贝洛伯格的天空，如今却登上了驶向宇宙的列车……
t_en: Not so long ago, I was still wondering whether I'd ever see Belobog's sky again. Now, I'm on a train coasting through the universe...

t_ch: …对不起，窗外的风景实在是太…我稍稍有些走神了。
t_en: ...Sorry, it's so beautiful outside... I got a little lost in thought.

t_ch: 我也经常这样。
t_en: Happens a lot here.

t_ch: 差点以为自己被卷入了什么童话故事里了……
t_en: I almost thought I'd slipped into a fairy tale...

t_ch: 看习惯就好了。
t_en: You'll get used to it.

t_ch: 不介意的话，我会经常过来坐坐。
t_en: I'll come and have a seat here more often, if you don't mind.

t_ch: 站在列车上时，我能感受到其实你们也和我们一样，正凭借自己的力量在宇宙中创造未来。
t_en: When I stand aboard the Express, I can feel that you and I are really the same — manifesting our own futures in this universe to the best of our abilities.

t_ch: 这就是开拓吧。
t_en: I think that's what's known as trailblazing.

t_ch: 嗯，大家都在为更广阔的风景而努力……
t_en: Mm, everyone's working hard for the bigger picture...

t_ch: 相信我在这儿会拥有许多愉快的回忆。
t_en: I believe I'll have lots of happy memories here.

t_ch: 感谢你邀请我登上星穹列车，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Thank you for inviting me aboard the Astral Express, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 贝洛伯格的天空……
t_en: The sky of Belobog...

t_ch: 就像当时期待贝洛伯格的天空一般，当我站在列车上时，我能感受到其实你们也和我们一样，正凭借自己的力量在宇宙中创造未来。
t_en: It's just like waiting for Belobog's skies back then... When I stand aboard the Express, I can feel that you and I are really the same — manifesting our own futures in this universe to the best of our abilities.

t_ch: 这就是开拓吧。
t_en: I think that's what's known as trailblazing.

t_ch: 嗯，大家都在为更广阔的风景而努力……
t_en: Mm, everyone's working hard for the bigger picture...

t_ch: 相信我在这儿会拥有许多愉快的回忆。
t_en: I believe I'll have lots of happy memories here.

t_ch: 感谢你邀请我登上星穹列车，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Thank you for inviting me aboard the Astral Express, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 上次出诊时，有个孩子哭得厉害，他经常在我这儿看病，该听的故事也都听过了，那天怎么哄他，他都不肯听。
t_en: The last time I was out in the field, there was a crying child. I'd seen him before many times at the clinic — he'd heard all my usual stories... But that day, no matter what I said to him, he wouldn't listen.

t_ch: 我就和他说起了列车，说着说着他就不哭了，还问了我很多问题。
t_en: So I told him about the Express, and eventually he stopped crying and started asking so many questions.

t_ch: 在磐岩镇能看见列车么？为什么列车会在天上飞？列车长是谁呀？
t_en: Can you see the Express in Boulder Town? Why does it fly in the sky? Who is the conductor?

t_ch: 我想想怎么回答…
t_en: Lemme think how to answer those...

t_ch: 其实不用回答也没关系，孩子会给出自己的答案。
t_en: Actually, I didn't need any answers — he made them all up himself.

t_ch: 「星星碎了，列车要到处去接星星，所以在天上飞。」
t_en: "The stars exploded, and the Express has to go everywhere to pick up all the pieces, and that's why it flies up in the sky."

t_ch: 「列车有很多列车朋友，它要去找它们玩儿。」
t_en: "The Express has lots of Express friends, and it wants to find them and play together."

t_ch: ——想象是一切存在的源泉，孩子只需要想象便能理解列车，不需要任何解释。
t_en: ...Imagination is the source of all existence. Children need only their imagination to understand the Express.

t_ch: 如果下次告诉他们，我登上星穹列车了，不知道他们会不会给我编出一百种登上列车的方式呢……
t_en: Then next time I'm back in Belobog I'll tell them I boarded the Express, and I'm sure they'll give me a hundred different explanations of how it happened...

t_ch: 和孩子们说起了列车……
t_en: Talk to the kids about the Express...

t_ch: 「星星碎了，列车要到处去接星星，所以在天上飞。」
t_en: "The stars exploded, and the Express has to go everywhere to pick up all the pieces, and that's why it flies up in the sky."

t_ch: 「列车有很多列车朋友，它要去找它们玩儿。」
t_en: "The Express has lots of Express friends, and it wants to find them and play together."

t_ch: ——想象是一切存在的源泉，孩子只需要想象便能理解列车，不需要任何解释。
t_en: ...Imagination is the source of all existence. Children need only their imagination to understand the Express.

t_ch: 如果下次告诉他们，我登上星穹列车了，不知道他们会不会给我编出一百种登上列车的方式呢……
t_en: Then next time I'm back in Belobog I'll tell them I boarded the Express, and I'm sure they'll give me a hundred different explanations of how it happened...

t_ch: 广袤的宇宙，雅利洛-Ⅵ…这样壮丽的景色，无论看多少次都不会感到厌烦。
t_en: The vast universe and Jarilo-VI... How could you ever get tired of such an incredible view.

t_ch: 如果有办法把这风景记录下来，带回去给孩子们看就好了。
t_en: If only there was a way for me to preserve this moment and show it to the kids back home.

t_ch: 我把手机借给你吧。
t_en: You can use my phone.

t_ch: 呵呵…你还是这么热心。只是……
t_en: Haha, kind-hearted as usual. It's just...

t_ch: 我去把三月七的相机拿来！
t_en: I'll go get March's camera!

t_ch: 呵呵…罢了罢了——那孩子要是发现相机丢了，肯定会着急的吧？况且……
t_en: Haha, that won't be necessary — I can't imagine March reacting well if her camera went missing. Besides...

t_ch: 你不是有手机吗？
t_en: Why not use your phone?

t_ch: 是啊，只是……
t_en: I could, but...

t_ch: …无论是手机，还是那孩子的相机，虽然都能够记录当下的景色，但那到底与我们人眼所见是大有不同的。
t_en: Phones and cameras capture great beauty, but it never compares to what we see with our own eyes.

t_ch: 若想要诊所的孩子们全身心地感受这风景…那就必须让他们来亲眼看看才行呢。
t_en: For the children in the clinic to truly know the feeling of this view, they'd have to be here to see it themselves.

t_ch: 如果能记录下窗外的风景……
t_en: If only I could record this scene outside the window...

t_ch: 无论是手机，还是那孩子的相机…虽然都能够记录当下的景色，但那到底与我们人眼所见是大有不同的。
t_en: Phones and cameras capture great beauty, but it never compares to what we see with our own eyes.

t_ch: 若想要诊所的孩子们全身心地感受这风景…那就必须让他们来亲眼看看才行呢。
t_en: For the children in the clinic to truly know the feeling of this view, they'd have to be here to see it themselves.

t_ch: 瓦赫…如果你也能像我一样，站在这列车里，从太空中眺望雅利洛-Ⅵ……
t_en: Vache... if you had the chance to stand here and watch Jarilo-VI from afar...

t_ch: …啊，是{NICKNAME}呀。不好意思，我看那舷窗外的风景有些出神，没能注意到你。
t_en: Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Sorry, I was lost in the view — I didn't realize you were here.

t_ch: 说起来，你还记得我们先前在雪原中的经历吗？
t_en: Do you remember us walking through the Snow Plains?

t_ch: 你说，如果哥哥能活到今天，像我一样站在这里，欣赏与贝洛伯格全然不同的风景…他又会作何感想呢？
t_en: This view is nothing like the views in Belobog... If my brother were still alive and standing here on the Express, I wonder what he'd make of all this.

t_ch: 他一定也会被宇宙震撼到吧。
t_en: He'd probably be pretty starstruck.

t_ch: 呵呵…是啊。我想，任何人看到这样的风景，都会感到震撼吧。
t_en: Hehe, I agree... It's hard not to be.

t_ch: 他恐怕还会心系自己的研究…
t_en: He'd probably still be thinking about his research...

t_ch: 呵呵…很像是他会做的事。
t_en: *sigh* ...That sounds like him alright.

t_ch: 我恐怕无法与他共情。
t_en: I'm afraid I can't empathize with him.

t_ch: 呵呵…也是。毕竟在许多人看来，他只是个草菅人命的恶魔……
t_en: Mm, I don't blame you for that. A disregard for human life doesn't exactly endear you to other humans...

t_ch: 瓦赫他…生前总是执着于借医学突破血肉之躯的极限，最后不得已含恨而终……
t_en: Vache spent his life looking for ways to push past the limits of the human body... but he met a bitter end.

t_ch: 而他却不知道，也正是我们这种连低温都无法应对的脆弱生物，才有办法挣脱重力的束缚，在宇宙中穿梭自如……
t_en: He never realized that human fragility is also the greatest driver of our accomplishments. Our bodies never conquered the cold, but our minds ensured that we never had to. Now we travel the stars...

t_ch: 人类…还真是矛盾的生物啊。
t_en: Human beings really are conflicted life forms...

t_ch: 不知道他会作何感想……
t_en: I wonder how he would feel...

t_ch: 瓦赫他…生前总是执着于借医学突破血肉之躯的极限，最后不得已含恨而终……
t_en: Vache spent his life looking for ways to push past the limits of the human body... but he met a bitter end.

t_ch: 而他却不知道，也正是我们这种连低温都无法应对的脆弱生物，才有办法挣脱重力的束缚，在宇宙中穿梭自如……
t_en: He never realized that human fragility is also the greatest driver of our accomplishments. Our bodies never conquered the cold, but our minds ensured that we never had to. Now we travel the stars...

t_ch: 人类…还真是矛盾的生物啊。
t_en: Human beings really are conflicted life forms...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我记得你们曾提起过，列车可以穿梭整个宇宙，造访银河各处不同的星球……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I remember you once said that the Express travels across the universe and visits all kinds of different planets...

t_ch: 我在想——如果我有机会的话，或许也可以和你们一起见识见识雅利洛-Ⅵ以外的世界。
t_en: I'm thinking... If I have the chance, I'd love to travel with you and see what lies beyond Jarilo-VI.

t_ch: 列车组随时欢迎你！
t_en: Join us anytime!

t_ch: 呵呵…你们的好意，我心领了。
t_en: Hehe, that's nice of you.

t_ch: 只可惜下层区的人们暂时还离不开我这个医生……
t_en: It's just, people in the Underworld still need a doctor...

t_ch: 可是下层区还需要你。
t_en: But the Underworld still needs you.

t_ch: 呵呵…你说得对。下层区的人们暂时还离不开我这个医生……
t_en: Hehe, you're right. People still rely on me as their doctor.

t_ch: 不过，我还是很期待与你们同行。我想看看别的星球、别的文明是如何战胜疾病的，我们贝洛伯格又是否可以效仿。
t_en: Still, I'm looking forward to the day I can join the crew. I'd like to see how other civilizations fight diseases and what Belobog could learn.

t_ch: 只是…如果真有一天，下层区的人们不再需要我这个医生了，大家都能够无忧无虑地健康生活下去……
t_en: Of course, if there is a day when the Underworld doesn't need a doctor like me anymore and everyone lives happily ever after...

t_ch: 那…我恐怕也没有踏上旅途的必要了吧。
t_en: ...then perhaps there won't be any reason for me to go on the journey with you after all.

t_ch: 想看看雅利洛-Ⅵ之外的世界……
t_en: I really want to see the world outside of Jarilo-VI...

t_ch: 我很期待与你们同行。我想看看别的星球、别的文明是如何战胜疾病的，我们贝洛伯格又是否可以效仿。
t_en: I'm looking forward to the day I can join the crew. I'd like to see how other civilizations fight diseases and what Belobog could learn.

t_ch: 只是…如果真有一天，下层区的人们不再需要我这个医生了，大家都能够无忧无虑地健康生活下去……
t_en: Of course, if there is a day when the Underworld doesn't need a doctor like me anymore and everyone lives happily ever after...

t_ch: 那…我恐怕也没有踏上旅途的必要了吧。
t_en: ...then perhaps there won't be any reason for me to go on the journey with you after all.

t_ch: 啊，是{NICKNAME}——我正到处找你呢。
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}! I've been looking for you.

t_ch: 事情是这样的：诊所里的孩子们听说了你和星穹列车的故事，便吵着闹着要为贝洛伯格的大英雄准备礼物……
t_en: So, the children in the clinic heard the story of you and the Express, and immediately insisted on sending a gift to the hero of Belobog.

t_ch: 虽说是礼物，但其实也只是孩子们东拼西凑的产物罢了…不成敬意，还请你能笑纳。
t_en: I say "gift," but it's more like bits and pieces the kids cobbled together. Still, I hope you like it.

t_ch: 孩子们为你准备了礼物……
t_en: The kids got something for you...

t_ch: 列车在星星间穿行…别说是孩子们，哪怕对我这样的大人而言，这场景也足够浪漫了。
t_en: Traveling between the stars... Even an adult like me can't help but find it captivating, let alone the children.

t_ch: 可惜，孩子们不像我这样幸运，能够登上列车一探究竟…但只是想象你们随着列车在宇宙中冒险，他们就已经很满足了。
t_en: It's a shame they're too young to board the Express. Still, your stories of space adventures always put a smile on their face.

t_ch: 所以…如果你将来经历了其他有趣的冒险故事，请一定要讲给我听哦？我会忠实地转述给孩子们的。
t_en: So, do let me know when you have more stories to share. I'm sure the kids will love them.

t_ch: 哇，列车的窗外就是宇宙吗？
t_en: Wowwww, so everything outside the window is the universe?

t_ch: 那么多星星好像糖果哦，数也数不完！
t_en: The stars look like candy! Endless candy...

t_ch: 哎呀呀，抓不到！
t_en: Ugh, if only I could grab them!

t_ch: 荣誉队员好笨！离这么远怎么可能抓得到星星嘛！
t_en: You're pretty stupid for an honorary member! How can you grab stars from so far away?

t_ch: 哪有这么大的糖！
t_en: I don't think they make candy that size...

t_ch: 你怎么知道？没有这么大的糖，说不定有蜂蜜味的星球呢？
t_en: How do you know? Hmph, even if they don't, who's to say there isn't a planet that tastes like honey...

t_ch: 虎克觉得，列车被很多星星包围着，就像是在糖果中穿梭的移动游乐园……
t_en: All these stars surrounding us... The Express is like a traveling theme park warp-jumping through candy...

t_ch: 喔，原来荣誉队员平时就住在游乐园里，羡慕死虎克啦！
t_en: Which means... you live inside a warp-jumping candy theme park! Not fair!

t_ch: 虎克大人，开始冒险吧。
t_en: Ready to start our adventure, Boss Hook?

t_ch: 哼哼，鼹鼠党的全新路线——星穹列车，开启！
t_en: Hehe, Hook hereby declares the Astral Express The Moles' newest adventure route!

t_ch: 我们出发吧！{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Full speed ahead, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 星星好像糖果哦！
t_en: The stars are like candies!

t_ch: 虎克觉得，列车被很多星星包围着，就像是在糖果中穿梭的移动游乐园……
t_en: All these stars surrounding us... The Express is like a traveling theme park warp-jumping through candy...

t_ch: 喔，原来荣誉队员平时就住在游乐园里，羡慕死虎克啦！
t_en: Which means... you live inside a warp-jumping candy theme park! Not fair!

t_ch: 虎克大人，开始冒险吧。
t_en: Ready to start our adventure, Boss Hook?

t_ch: 哼哼，鼹鼠党的全新路线——星穹列车，开启！
t_en: Hehe, Hook hereby declares the Astral Express The Moles' newest adventure route!

t_ch: 我们出发吧！{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Full speed ahead, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 帕姆…呜呜呜…帕姆……
t_en: Pom-Pom... *whimper* Pom-Pom...

t_ch: 帕姆欺负你了？
t_en: Is Pom-Pom bullying you, Hook?

t_ch: 帕姆才不会这么做呢，不许你这么说帕姆。
t_en: Pom-Pom wouldn't do that. You're not allowed to say that about Pom-Pom.

t_ch: 你欺负帕姆了？
t_en: Are you bullying Pom-Pom, Hook?

t_ch: 虎克没有！虎克才不会那么做！
t_en: No way! Hook would never do that!

t_ch: 虎克想邀请帕姆到磐岩镇来玩，但虎克刚知道帕姆不能下列车……
t_en: I wanted to invite Pom-Pom to come visit Boulder Town, but I just found out Pom-Pom can't leave the Express...

t_ch: 帕、帕姆不能一起大冒险了，呜呜……
t_en: P—Pom-Pom can't come adventuring with us... *whimper*

t_ch: 帕姆会和列车一起冒险。
t_en: Even from the Express, Pom-Pom's still part of the adventure.

t_ch: 唔，荣誉队员说得对，帕姆会和你们一起冒险。
t_en: *sniff* W—Well, I guess you're right, honorary member. At least Pom-Pom is always on an adventure with you...

t_ch: 多多来列车看看帕姆吧。
t_en: Come see Pom-Pom on the Express more often.

t_ch: 嗯，有我漆黑的虎克大人在，帕姆一定不会觉得无聊的。
t_en: *sniff* I—I will! When Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's on the Express, Pom-Pom will never get bored!

t_ch: 那虎克就特批帕姆为鼹鼠党的荣誉队员吧。
t_en: It's settled then — Hook will make Pom-Pom an honorary member of The Moles.

t_ch: 答应我，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}，我不在的时候……
t_en: Promise me, honorary member {NICKNAME}: When Hook isn't here on the train...

t_ch: …你一定要照顾好荣誉队员帕姆！不然我就拿你问事…不对，拿你是问！
t_en: ...you have to take good care of honorary member Pom-Pom! Otherwise, I'll hold you "accountantable"! Wait... accountable!

t_ch: 帕姆…帕姆……
t_en: Pom-Pom... Pom-Pom...

t_ch: 虎克就特批帕姆为鼹鼠党的荣誉队员吧。
t_en: Hook will make Pom-Pom an honorary member of The Moles.

t_ch: 答应我，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}，我不在的时候……
t_en: Promise me, honorary member {NICKNAME}: When Hook isn't here on the train...

t_ch: …你一定要照顾好荣誉队员帕姆！不然我就拿你问事…不对，拿你是问！
t_en: ...you have to take good care of honorary member Pom-Pom! Otherwise, I'll hold you "accountantable"! Wait... accountable!

t_ch: 喔，这不是荣誉队员{NICKNAME}嘛！
t_en: Well, well, well, if it isn't our honorary member {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 漆黑的虎克大人正准备举行捉迷藏比赛呢！你要参加吗？
t_en: Pitch-Dark Hook the Great is about to host a hide-and-seek contest! You wanna come?

t_ch: 我要参加！
t_en: Sure thing!

t_ch: 喔——太好了！这样就有两个人一起玩了！
t_en: Yay! We've got two contestants!

t_ch: 都有谁要一起来？
t_en: Who else is coming?

t_ch: 唔…目、目前只有虎克一个人！
t_en: Well... A—At the moment, it's just you and me.

t_ch: 列车里玩这个不好吧…
t_en: We probably shouldn't run around on the Express...

t_ch: 哎哟，怎么连你也这么说呀！这下不就只剩下虎克自己了嘛！
t_en: Huh!? Even YOU won't play with me? Hook can't hide AND seek y'know!

t_ch: 我之前去问了列车上的其他人…帕姆说它还有事要忙，但同意了虎克举办捉迷藏比赛——只要虎克不进引擎室就行。
t_en: I asked the others if they were interested... Pom-Pom was too busy, but they agreed to let me host the contest on the Express — as long as I don't use the engine room!

t_ch: 姬子姐姐说她不擅长捉迷藏；瓦尔特叔叔虽然一脸想要参加的样子，但最后还是苦着脸拒绝了我，也没和虎克说到底为什么……
t_en: Himeko said she's terrible at hide-and-seek. Welt looked excited, but then he said it was a shame he couldn't do it and never explained why...

t_ch: 呣呣呣…虎克还得再抓几个人来才行！列车这么大，不玩捉迷藏的话…不是浪费了嘛！
t_en: Hmm... Hook needs to find more people! The Express is huge, it's a waste of space to not play!

t_ch: 这里好适合玩捉迷藏！
t_en: This place is perfect for playing hide-and-seek!

t_ch: 我之前去问了列车上的其他人…帕姆说它还有事要忙，但同意了虎克举办捉迷藏比赛——只要虎克不进引擎室就行。
t_en: I asked the others if they were interested... Pom-Pom was too busy, but they agreed to let me host the contest on the Express — as long as I don't use the engine room!

t_ch: 姬子姐姐说她不擅长捉迷藏；瓦尔特叔叔虽然一脸想要参加的样子，但最后还是苦着脸拒绝了我，也没和虎克说到底为什么……
t_en: Himeko said she's terrible at hide-and-seek. Welt looked excited, but then he said it was a shame he couldn't do it and never explained why...

t_ch: 呣呣呣…虎克还得再抓几个人来才行！列车这么大，不玩捉迷藏的话…不是浪费了嘛！
t_en: Hmm... Hook needs to find more people! The Express is huge, it's a waste of space to not play!

t_ch: 荣誉队员！你快过来，虎克大人有问题要问你！
t_en: Honorary member! Come over here! Hook has a question for you!

t_ch: 你说——是列车更漂亮一点，还是老巫婆的诊所更漂亮一点？
t_en: Which place looks nicer — the Express or the old witch's clinic?

t_ch: 列车更漂亮！
t_en: The Express!

t_ch: 哼，那是你没有见过我们一起过煦日节的时候！诊所可漂亮了！
t_en: Hmph! That's because you've never seen what the clinic looks like in the Solwarm Festival! It's fabulous!

t_ch: 诊所更漂亮！
t_en: The clinic!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，我就知道！果然还是诊所更漂亮啦！
t_en: Hehe, I knew it! Of course it does!

t_ch: 老巫婆更漂亮！
t_en: The old witch looks nicer than either of them!

t_ch: 不生气的老巫婆当然很漂亮…等等，荣誉队员你的回答偏题了！
t_en: Hmph, only when she's not angry... Wait, honorary member, stop changing the subject!

t_ch: 我来告诉你答案吧：当然是我们的诊所更漂亮哦！
t_en: I'll tell you my answer: It's the clinic!

t_ch: 不过…虎克觉得，你们的列车也不比我们的诊所差！
t_en: Although... The Express looks almost as good!

t_ch: 你看，这里到处都金灿灿、亮堂堂的…这个石头地板还能照出虎克的脸呢！
t_en: Everything is so shiny and sparkly... I can see my face in the floor!

t_ch: ——虎克决定啦，等虎克和鼹鼠党的大家找到了宝藏，也帮老巫婆翻新一下诊所好了，就当是报答一饭…一饭……
t_en: I've made up my mind. When The Moles find treasure under my leadership, we'll help the old witch make her clinic shiny and sparkly...

t_ch: …一饭之恩！对，就是这个！
t_en: The Moles always repay our debts!

t_ch: …一饭之恩！对，就是这个！
t_en: The Moles always repay our debts!

t_ch: 列车好漂亮呀！
t_en: The Express is so pretty!

t_ch: 你看，列车上到处都金灿灿、亮堂堂的…这个石头地板还能照出虎克的脸呢！
t_en: Everything is so shiny and sparkly... I can see my face in the floor!

t_ch: ——虎克决定啦，等虎克和鼹鼠党的大家找到了宝藏，也帮老巫婆翻新一下诊所好了，就当是报答一饭…一饭……
t_en: I've made up my mind. When The Moles find treasure under my leadership, we'll help the old witch make her clinic shiny and sparkly...

t_ch: …一饭之恩！对，就是这个！
t_en: The Moles always repay our debts!

t_ch: 嘿，荣誉队员！快看，三月七姐姐给了我一个趴趴玩偶，和你长得好像哦！
t_en: Look, honorary member! March 7th gave me a doll. It looks just like you!

t_ch: 我真可爱！
t_en: I am a bit of a cutie!

t_ch: 唔…虎克可没说这个。
t_en: Uh, that's not what Hook said...

t_ch: 不过…它确实很可爱，也很软！老爹肯定会喜欢的！
t_en: But... it does look cute. And it's soft too! Daddy will love it.

t_ch: 她怎么把这个给你了？
t_en: Why did she give you a doll?

t_ch: 其实，虎克这次来列车，是想要给老爹带个纪念品回去——毕竟老爹身体不太好，没有办法亲自上来看看……
t_en: Well, I've been looking for a souvenir for daddy since I boarded the Express. He's not so well, so he can't pay a visit himself...

t_ch: 虎克到处问大家，有没有可以给虎克当纪念品的东西。然后，三月七姐姐就把这个趴趴玩偶给我啦！
t_en: I was asking around to see if I could find anything. Then I bumped into March and she gave me this doll!

t_ch: 老爹平时总是说腰不舒服…三月七姐姐说，只要把这个玩偶垫在腰上，就会舒服很多了！
t_en: Daddy always says his back is sore... March said if we lay this puppet behind his back, he'll feel much more comfortable!

t_ch: 而且它还是荣誉队员的造型呢，是帮了虎克和老爹大忙的优秀队员！虎克觉得这个纪念品真的很棒哦！
t_en: It's modeled after you, honorary member! You did a big favor for Hook and daddy, so I think this is a fitting gift!

t_ch: 给老爹带个玩偶回去！
t_en: Let's get a doll for daddy!

t_ch: 虎克到处问大家，有没有可以给虎克当纪念品的东西。然后，三月七姐姐就把这个趴趴玩偶给我啦！
t_en: I was asking around to see if I could find anything. Then I bumped into March and she gave me this doll!

t_ch: 老爹平时总是说腰不舒服…三月七姐姐说，只要把这个玩偶垫在腰上，就会舒服很多了！
t_en: Daddy always says his back is sore... March said if we lay this puppet behind his back, he'll feel much more comfortable!

t_ch: 而且它还是荣誉队员的造型呢，是帮了虎克和老爹大忙的优秀队员！虎克觉得这个纪念品真的很棒哦！
t_en: It's modeled after you, honorary member! You did a big favor for Hook and daddy, so I think this is a fitting gift!

t_ch: 喔，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！虎克大人正找你呢，你跑哪去啦！
t_en: Hey, honorary member {NICKNAME}! Boss Hook has been looking for you. Where have you been?

t_ch: 来，给你！这可是很珍贵的东西——虽然虎克不懂，但老爹是这么说的！
t_en: Here, this is for you. It's worth a lot according to daddy. I don't know much about it, but daddy is always right.

t_ch: 谢谢虎克大人！
t_en: Long live Boss Hook!

t_ch: 客气什么呀，这都是虎克应该做的！
t_en: No need for formalities — you deserve it!

t_ch: 为了给你准备这个…礼物，虎克和老爹花了好大力气呢！
t_en: It took Hook and daddy a lot of effort to prepare this gift for you!

t_ch: 这是什么？
t_en: What is it?

t_ch: 虎克也不知道，但为了给你准备这个…礼物，虎克和老爹花了好大力气呢！
t_en: Hook doesn't know either. But it took Hook and daddy a lot of effort to prepare this gift for you!

t_ch: 不如提拔我当鼹鼠党二把手…
t_en: Why don't you make me deputy leader of The Moles...

t_ch: 哎呀，荣誉队员你怎么还挑三拣四的！
t_en: Hmph! Since when did honorary members get so choosy?

t_ch: 为了给你准备这个…礼物，虎克和老爹花了好大力气呢！
t_en: It took Hook and daddy a lot of effort to prepare this gift for you!

t_ch: 总之你就收下吧，别和我客气啦！
t_en: Anyway, just take it! Enjoy your gift!

t_ch: 别客气，荣誉队员！
t_en: You're welcome, honorary member!

t_ch: 这可是很珍贵的东西——虽然虎克不懂，但老爹是这么说的！
t_en: It's worth a lot according to daddy. I don't know much about it, but daddy is always right.

t_ch: 总之…你就收下吧，别和我客气啦！
t_en: Anyway, just take it! Enjoy your gift!

t_ch: 列车，真的在天上飞呢……
t_en: The Express really does fly up in the sky...

t_ch: 这里应该很高吧？比史瓦罗先生的肩膀还要高好多……
t_en: We must be really high up here, right? Much higher than Mr. Svarog's shoulders...

t_ch: …现在，克拉拉感觉就像是做梦一样。
t_en: ...I feel like I'm dreaming.

t_ch: 不是做梦哦。
t_en: It's not a dream.

t_ch: 克拉拉知道…克拉拉今天晚上要高兴得睡不着了……
t_en: I know... I think I'll be too excited to sleep tonight...

t_ch: 特别厉害吧？
t_en: Pretty awesome, right?

t_ch: 嗯，就像电影…不对，克拉拉看过的电影里也没有出现过这样的场景……
t_en: Mm-hmm, it's just like a movie... Actually, I've never seen a movie with views like this before...

t_ch: 下次克拉拉一定要说服史瓦罗先生一起来。
t_en: Next time, I'll have to convince Mr. Svarog to come along.

t_ch: 看来克拉拉很喜欢列车。
t_en: Seems you like the Express very much.

t_ch: 喜欢！
t_en: I love it!

t_ch: 谢谢你邀请克拉拉过来，{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
t_en: Thank you for bringing me along, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 列车在飞呢……
t_en: The Express's flying...
